<p>Do you owe me money or need to send me a payment?  Or would you simply like to donate to the cost of running this website?</p>

<p>If so, you can easily send money using Paypal :)</p>

<p><form action="https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr" method="post">
<input type="hidden" name="cmd" value="_s-xclick" />
<input type="image" border="0" src="https://www.paypal.com/en_US/i/btn/x-click-but04.gif" name="submit" alt="Make payments with PayPal - it's fast, free and secure!" />
<input type="hidden" name="encrypted" value="-----BEGIN PKCS7----------END PKCS7-----" />
</form></p>
